notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __threadsFromIgModal) titled 'Open on Threads'. Extracts username from current Instagram URL (instagram.com/<username>) and shows a modal with the Threads URL. Buttons to open the profile or copy the URL. Modal appears even in headless CI since URL parsing is synchronous.
